problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Spintronics. Spintronics for low-power data storage directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
